subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the chief among lovers! In accordance with wisdom, no name or title hath been written. The purpose is that thou shouldst know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرحلقه عاشقان نظر بحکمت اسم و رسم مرقوم نگردید مقصود آنست که بدانی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
